title: Result - Germany
content:
Welcome to Germany, the heart of Europe, offering diverse landscapes and vibrant cities, each with its own charm.
Discover Düsseldorf’s fashion, Berlin’s music scene, Hamburg’s art and Munich’s nightlife. For outdoor enthusiasts, enjoy skiing in the Alps or water sports on Northern Germany’s beaches. Germany is known for its lively festivals, from Oktoberfest to wine and music celebrations, bringing people together in joyous tradition.

## Unique food tradition
Currywurst: a dish made with sausage, fries and a spicy ketchup sauce.
Strong industrial sectors include automotive, chemicals, green technologies, renewable energy and software.

### Local legend or myth
The Lorelei: a German legend about a beautiful woman who sits on a rock in the Rhine River and sings to lure sailors to their deaths in dangerous waters.

### Language of the Land
Around 130 million people speak German as their first or second language, making it the 11th most popular language in the world.
types of beer are brewed in Germany, where 1,500 breweries still follow the Reinvestigate (German Beer Purity Law) of 1516, limiting ingredients to barley, water and hops, shaping the country’s brewing legacy.
